_note: LT14-A: prove formula-owned status application and one-target-turn duration on the current Steam executable. A connected basic Attack (ability 0, type 1) adds Blind through the durable master/effective arrays when forced 3d6 roll 18 exceeds resistance 10. Native Attack has no status rider. DurationTargetTurns=1 should preserve Blind through the application window and clear it only after the target completes its next turn. The DCL damage formula is deliberately empty: vanilla damage is preserved while the successful apply callback owns only the status.
